text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's our first day of summer camp, and we've arrived at the seaside
facility where everyone has gathered for some summertime training.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I check in on Mayano Top Gun to see what she's up to in her free
time.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: I'm finally done! Freeeeeedom!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Gosh, isn't this supposed to be a summer camp? Why are they even
giving out regular school homework?
choice_data_list:
You did your homework? By yourself? Without
anyone telling you to?

You did your homework? By yourself? Without
anyone telling you to?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Hm? Oh, it's you!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Mmhmm, that's exactly right! It was suuuuuper boring, but I did it! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Ehehe, right? Keep the praise coming!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I mean, you said I might discover something new, but I don't think I
have... Not yet, at least.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: But still, you might be right, so I thought I'd keep at it for now!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Oh, right! Since I did my homework, can we do something together? I
wanna go to the beach! That's okay with you, right?!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Yaaaay! Then let's—

text_block_list.name: Serious Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Mayano! The teacher told us about you! Pretty impressive, I
have to say.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Huh? What are you talking about?

text_block_list.name: Serious Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Y'know, the pop quiz we had the other day? You used your own
formula to solve the problems, didn't you?

text_block_list.name: Serious Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Our teacher was like, "She always finishes her tests so quickly. What's
up with that?" She even said it's a surprisingly efficient way of solving
the problem.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: R-really? I thought I was doing it the same way as everyone else...

text_block_list.name: Serious Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
That's probably because you're always sleeping during lessons. She
even wants to show the class how you did it next time.

text_block_list.name: Serious Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Actually, if you don't mind... I wanted to ask if you could study with
me sometime. Maybe teach me a thing or two?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Oh, uh... S-sure! Yeah, that sounds good! Let's do it!

text_block_list.name: Serious Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Yay! Thanks a bunch! Y'know, I was always afraid of talking to you,
since the two of us seem so different.

text_block_list.name: Serious Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
But I'm glad I reached out to you today, Mayano! I'll see you again
soon!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Um... I guess we should go?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Mayano grabs my hand and drags me away from the camp.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: ...Wooow.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Ahhhh! Hey, were you listening to what she said earlier?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: No one's ever praised me for studying before! And I even made a new friend!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I think I get it now though. My teacher told me to show my work
'cause she wanted to know how I solve the problems!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Y'know, until now, whenever other people said they didn't get
something, in my head I was always like, "Why don't you get it? What
is there not to get?"

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: But now I see that it's just 'cause we're doing things differently!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
There are different kinds of formulas just like there are different kinds
of running! That's why people worry... 'Cause everyone has their own
style!
choice_data_list:
And if you learn about these different methods
of doing things, you'll be all the wiser, right?

And if you learn about these different methods
of doing things, you'll be all the wiser, right?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Yeah, exactly! It feels like my vision was all fuzzy from some silly clouds, but then they went woosh, and bam! Blue skies as far as the eye can see!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Hm... Maybe my reason for doing homework is different from everybody else's too!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Uhhh... So my teacher can know more about me! "This is how Maya
would solve the problem." That's what I wanna show her!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
And then! And then! Once she gets to know me better, she can tell
everybody about me and how I solve my problems!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: And then I can make even more friends!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Hey, I know I already have my friends and teachers asking me to do
stuff, but... do you think you could give me some too?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! You could give me, like, running-related homework or
something!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Some kinda special homework just for me...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
It'll be like you're with me even when we're apart! Our own special
connection!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
If I think of homework like that, I'm sure it'll feel a little less boring!
Still boring, but not as much!
choice_data_list: You're one step closer to becoming a grown-up.
You're one step closer to becoming a grown-up.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Really? You think so? Was I being super mature or something?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Heh-heh... Ehehehehehe... That's right. I'm one step closer to
becoming a grown-up woman!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Hey, can I ask you something?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Since I'm being mature... could you give me a grown-up reward? ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I agree to her request and follow Mayano to the nearby beach that
night.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Whoaaaa! The stars are so pretty! And look at that ocean!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Even the waves! The splish-splash is so quiet now! This is the perfect grown-up atmosphere!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: I think I saw a nice rock to sit on earlier. Let's go there!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: We can have a nice little chat! Like grown-ups do!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: We head over to the rock, only to find...

text_block_list.name: Boyfriend
text_block_list.text: Close your eyes, my dear...

text_block_list.name: Girlfriend
text_block_list.text: All right...

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Eep!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: W-wahhhhh!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: ...And so, Mayano Top Gun awakes the next day with a slight fever.
